generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllable lighting dimmer device that receives command signals from the twin for lighting adjustment."
]

instance LightingSwitchActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllable lighting switch device that receives on/off command signals from the twin."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor embedded in the BIM model, provides post‑occupancy sensor data for real‑time monitoring and reinforcement‑learning control (BOREALIS).",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingControlSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "General building control sensor (e.g., temperature, CO₂) defined in the enriched BIM metadata, used for monitoring and RL‑based control.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingControlDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance BuildingControlDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingControlSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static BIM geometry and semantic model serving as the digital backbone of the building twin.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseDitto
]

instance DeviceRuntimeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime device model (sensors, actuators, control logic) auto‑generated from enriched BIM metadata.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseDitto
]

instance ReinforcementLearningControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement‑learning control model (BOREALIS) that adapts lighting control policies based on post‑occupancy data.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseDitto
]

instance UnrealVisualizationMeshModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization meshes imported into Unreal Engine 5 for interactive twin visualization.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerUnrealEngine
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time occupancy measurement stream originating from OccupancySensor.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseHono
]

instance BuildingControlData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Realtime building control measurements (e.g., temperature, CO₂) from BuildingControlSensor.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingControlDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseHono
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EnablerEclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono broker streaming sensor measurements from physical devices to the twin.",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance EnablerEclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto digital‑twin state manager that receives data from Hono and feeds downstream services.",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService,
                    VisualizationService,
                    PredictiveAnalyticsService,
                    EnergyLightingOptimizationService,
                    RLControlAdaptationService
]

instance EnablerUnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 runtime that renders the 3‑D interactive visualization of the building twin.",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance EnablerModelDrivenPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑driven engineering transformation pipeline that extracts device metadata from BIM and auto‑generates runtime artifacts.",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService,
                    RLControlAdaptationService
]

// C6: Services
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring service consuming sensor streams for facility‑manager dashboards.",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3‑D interactive visualization service powered by Unreal Engine 5.",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service that generates forecasts and optimisation results for building operation.",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance EnergyLightingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy and lighting optimisation service that computes optimal lighting set‑points.",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight,
                    AdjustLightingAction
]

instance RLControlAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement‑learning based control policy adaptation service (BOREALIS) that updates lighting control strategies.",
    DTDFVocab:provides RLPolicyUpdateAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time insight on occupancy and environmental conditions supporting facility‑manager decisions."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight delivered via an immersive 3‑D view of the building twin in Unreal Engine 5."
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insight offering forecasts of energy consumption and occupancy trends."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight presenting optimal lighting configurations for energy saving while maintaining comfort."
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic command to dimming or switch lighting actuators based on optimisation results.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RLPolicyUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of the reinforcement‑learning control policy applied to lighting devices.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Environment
instance BuildingLivingLab : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin of a living‑lab building covering design, construction and operational phases.",
    base:contains OccupancySensor,
                    BuildingControlSensor,
                    LightingDimmerActuator,
                    LightingSwitchActuator,
                    BIMGeometryModel,
                    DeviceRuntimeModel,
                    ReinforcementLearningControlModel,
                    UnrealVisualizationMeshModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication enables the DT to issue control commands (e.g., lighting set‑points) back to actuators via the Hono/Ditto integration layer, closing the loop for actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Near real‑time, continuous synchronization where sensor updates and control commands are exchanged at sub‑second to second intervals, supporting live monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A service‑oriented architecture that orchestrates BIM‑derived models, middleware (Hono/Ditto), and visualization components to deliver a unified building twin."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building lifecycle: design (BIM creation), construction, operation (live data integration), and refurbishment/adaptation phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is used to quantify the fidelity of the twin to its physical counterpart; semantic drift and verification are acknowledged as concerns."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical devices connect to the twin via Eclipse Hono, which forwards data to Eclipse Ditto for twin state management, providing bidirectional communication between the physical asset and its digital representation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses BIM as an industry‑standard data model; provides standardized extension points and adheres to the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) assessment framework."
]
